name: example-mcp
description: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Gemini CLI.'
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Optional HTTP server base URL for remote/platform fallback and health monitoring. The default MCP connection uses local stdio instead.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for HTTP MCP fallback. Not used by the default stdio connection.

settings.name: example_api_url
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'example_api_url' with your service's credential field name. For platform servers, this is the deployed REST API base URL used by the local stdio adapter. For upstream-client servers, this is the upstream service endpoint. Maps to EXAMPLE_API_URL env var.

settings.name: example_api_key
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'example_api_key' with your service's credential field name. API key or bearer token for your upstream service. Maps to EXAMPLE_API_KEY env var.
